ResortMedium Featured

Kiahuna Golf Club

Koloa, Kauai

About This Course

Robert Trent Jones Jr. design in Poipu with ancient lava walls and tropical gardens. Garden Isle charm.

Style: Robert Trent Jones Jr. resort course

Course Stats

72
Par
6,400
Yards
Medium
